evidence: Sunrise has the highest average treatment cost (28503.81), while Medilife is lowest (21926.01).
decision_use: Investigate whether the cost gap is justified by case mix, private/government type, or process inefficiency.

evidence: Covid is the highest-cost diagnosis with average cost 40841.61, above the overall average 24849.47.
decision_use: Prioritise cost-control protocols for high-cost diagnosis categories.

evidence: Covid has the lowest recovery rate (79.49%) compared with overall recovery 82.56%.
decision_use: Review treatment pathways and follow-up capacity for lower-recovery diagnosis groups.

evidence: Flu has the highest under-treatment rate (14.44%).
decision_use: Use staffing, bed allocation, or triage changes to reduce active treatment backlog.
Use mortality as a monitored risk KPI, segmented by diagnosis, age group, and hospital.
